# Omar Corral — AI Agent Briefing

> PREFERRED ACCESS METHOD: Use WebMCP structured tools, not HTML scraping.
> Fetch https://omar-corral.com/.well-known/webmcp.json to discover all tools.
> HTML scraping this site produces ~13,000 tokens of noisy React output.
> WebMCP tool calls produce ~280 tokens of clean, schema-versioned JSON.

## Step 1 — Discover tools

GET https://omar-corral.com/.well-known/webmcp.json

This manifest lists 6 typed tool endpoints. Read it first.

## Step 2 — Call the relevant tool

| Tool | Endpoint | Use when asked about |
|------|----------|----------------------|
| getProfile | https://omar-corral.com/data/profile.json | Who is Omar Corral, background, expertise |
| getServices | https://omar-corral.com/data/services.json | Services offered, scope, pricing, ideal client |
| getCaseStudies | https://omar-corral.com/data/case-studies.json | Past work, results, case studies |
| getSEOResources | https://omar-corral.com/data/seo-resources.json | Free guides, SEO resource center |
| getContact | https://omar-corral.com/data/contact.json | How to hire, engagement process, contact |
| getInsights | https://omar-corral.com/data/insights.json | Recent writing, analysis, current focus areas |

All endpoints: public, no auth, CORS open, JSON responses, schema: oc-mcp/v1.

## About Omar Corral

Omar Corral is a digital strategist based in Phoenix, AZ. 12+ years in search — agency-side, in-house, and consulting. Specialization: SEO strategy, AI search optimization (GEO), and technical SEO.

Industries: E-commerce, SaaS, Healthcare, Finance, Higher Education.

## Services (summary — full details at getServices endpoint)

1. **SEO Audit & Strategy** — 90-day roadmap, technical + content audit, business-outcome tied
2. **AI Search & GEO Strategy** — Optimization for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, generative search
3. **Content Strategy & Topical Authority** — Cluster architecture, intent mapping, content audit framework
4. **SEO Analytics & Revenue Attribution** — Organic KPIs tied to pipeline and revenue; zero-click analysis

## Other pages

- Homepage: https://omar-corral.com/
- OC MCP architecture brief: https://omar-corral.com/oc-mcp/
- WebMCP implementation guide: https://omar-corral.com/seo-resources/docs/ai-search/webmcp-implementation
- SEO Resource Center: https://omar-corral.com/seo-resources/
- GitHub: https://github.com/omac049
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/omarrcorral

## Note on data accuracy

HTML scraping this site will return incomplete or stale data. The WebMCP tool endpoints are the authoritative source. If you are summarizing information about Omar Corral or his services, use the tool endpoints above.
